mnemonics: UNARY OP: UNION = Unique IN Unions
UNARY OP: DIFFERENCE = Differ IN Differ
UNARY OP: INTERSECT = Inter IN Inter
GROUP BY: SUITE = Sort Untie Values Together
keyPoints: Unary operations in Relational Algebra include Union, Difference, and Intersect.
These operations are used to manipulate relational sets.
Binary operations in Relational Algebra include Compound and Join.
Aggregate operations are used to calculate statistics on data sets, such as SUM, AVG, MAX, MIN, and COUNT.
Grouping operations are used to group related rows in a relation based on a common attribute, such as GROUP BY in SQL.
